text:
Nipaper (ニペイパー, Nipeipā) was a Royal Bodyguard for Prince Momoze Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 361 until her death, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 368 operating also as a spy for Queen Duazul. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 

Appearance

Nipaper has fair hair at the top of his head, while the sides are shaved. He has small eyes, a nose with a thin bridge, long, angled eyebrows, and a prominent chin. He is bespectacled. As a Royal Bodyguard, he wears a black suit and a tie. 

Personality

Nipaper shows an obligation to stay and protect his client, even when ordered to protect Prince Marayam, though this may have been a ploy to continue spying on her as he's a spy for Duazul Hui. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

On Queen Sevanti's orders, Prince Momoze's bodyguards are transferred over to Prince Marayam. However, Nipaper and Bladge insist on continuing being Prince Momoze's bodyguards. The prince praises them for their loyalty. With no one able to prepare supper, Bladge prepares her dinner, impressing Nipaper. 

As Prince Momoze rests in her bedroom, Nipaper, Bladge, Vict, and Laroc stand guard outside her room, while Tuffdy patiently waits to assassinate the prince. After Prince Momoze's murder, Nipaper, along with the other bodyguards, are taken into custody by the Kakin Army to be interrogated about the murder.
